title.en: Obviously, this data is not based on cultivation.

content.en:
Soon, one after another high-level immeasurable lifeforms were tested, and nearly half of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms were directly kicked out because they could not meet the standards of the ruins stone tower.

Maybe they were the existence that countless Great Ancestors looked up to in the outside world, but they couldn't do anything here, once they were kicked out, even if they were top-notch third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, they would not be able to resist.

Perhaps only by becoming a high-level immeasurable lifeform in the fourth stage can they resist the rules of the Ruined Stone Tower.

And many high-level immeasurable lifeforms have also figured out the standards of the Ruins Stone Tower, and they only need to have a detection data of more than 2 to pass.

And most of the high-level immeasurable lifeforms only had a few points of data, and they were directly kicked out.

The point is that some of the slightly weaker third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms meet the standards, while some of the top third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms have been kicked out.

Obviously, this data is not based on cultivation.

"It should be based on the potential of flesh and blood!"

Ye Tian guessed.

After all, this first layer is to detect the flesh and blood, since it is not according to the cultivation, it is naturally not determined by the strength of the flesh and blood, and there is a high probability that it is the potential of the flesh and blood.

The potential is not good, even if the cultivation is high, it will not be recognized by the ruins stone tower, and it will naturally be kicked out.

Finally, Ye Tian also went up and stood in the aperture.

The next moment, a piece of data emerged.

“4.8"

Seeing this data, all the high-level immeasurable lifeforms were shocked.

You must know that the best data before was only close to about 4, and Ye Tian directly raised this number to almost 4.8.

This meant that Ye Tian's flesh and blood body had a potential far beyond that of other high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

And Ye Tian himself had some accidents.

"I didn't expect that the physical potential of the Xuan Ming Great Ancestor's copied body was much higher than that of the other high-level immeasurable lifeforms present!" Ye Tian said darkly.

If his real body is copied to detect it, the number will inevitably be even more exaggerated.

After all, he hadn't invested too many resources in the copy body of the Xuanming Great Ancestor, so the potential of the flesh and blood body was still limited.

At this time, the ruins stone pagoda also gave Ye Tian a piece of blood holy gold.

"It's also Blood Saint Gold, many high-level immeasurable lifeforms here have obtained Blood Saint Gold, it seems that there are really a lot of Blood Saint Gold in the Ruins Stone Tower!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Wow!

In an instant, Ye Tian teleported to the second layer of the Ruined Stone Tower.

After entering the second layer, Ye Tian obtained a little information from the ruins stone tower and knew the situation on the second layer.

In order to obtain benefits from the second layer of the Relic Stone Tower, a life must be derived from the Relic Stone Tower, and the life derived must meet the standards of the Relic Stone Tower in order to obtain benefits.

The area of the second layer was much larger than that of the first layer, but it was still nothing for a high-level immeasurable lifeform.

Airplanes!

A drop of blood fell in front of Ye Tian.

"Immeasurable blood!" Ye Tian was slightly surprised, the ruins stone pagoda gave him a drop of immeasurable blood, and let him use immeasurable blood to derive a kind of life.

Immediately, he discovered that every high-level immeasurable lifeform had obtained a drop of immeasurable blood, and they all needed to use this drop of immeasurable blood to derive a creature that met the criteria.

The point is, what is the standard, they are completely unclear.

And the immeasurable blood will be exhausted, and once it is exhausted, it will not be possible to regenerate living beings.

Fortunately, there is no time limit, so many high-level immeasurable life forms are thinking seriously.

Suddenly.

A high-level immeasurable lifeform broke through his body and took out drops of immeasurable blood.

"Hahaha, anyway, I didn't say that I couldn't use my own immeasurable blood, just a ruin stone tower, and there was no lifeform to manipulate it, so I cheated like this, I shouldn't be discovered!"

However, other high-level immeasurable lifeforms did not do so.

After all, if he succeeded, other high-level immeasurable lifeforms would definitely do the same.

I saw that this high-level immeasurable lifeform frantically used drops of immeasurable blood to derive, and it didn't take too long for a creature to be successfully derived.

"Failed!"

The high-level immeasurable lifeform frowned.

Subsequently, he tried several more times, but was not recognized by the ruins stone tower.

At this time, the Great Ancestor of the Star Sea sneered: "Don't waste your immeasurable blood in vain, this immeasurable blood contains the original aura of the Ruins Stone Tower, and it belongs to the immeasurable blood of special transformation." The life derived from this immeasurable blood will promote the growth of the Ruined Stone Tower!"

"I see!"

Many high-level immeasurable lifeforms suddenly realized.

Obviously, cheating is impossible!

Subsequently, other high-level immeasurable lifeforms used the immeasurable blood of the ruins stone tower to evolve into creatures.

Time passed slowly, and I don't know how long it was.

Suddenly.

A high-level immeasurable lifeform was directly kicked out, and it turned out that his immeasurable blood was exhausted, so he was judged to fail by the ruins stone tower and kicked out directly.

At this moment, other high-level immeasurable lifeforms were directly cautious, and they didn't dare to consume this drop of immeasurable blood casually!

......

Ye Tian was full of confidence, but he felt that if the creatures derived far exceeded the standard, would the benefits he get from the Ruined Stone Tower be better.

If that were the case, he would have to find a way to make the best creatures.

"It's better to replicate this drop of immeasurable blood in the outside world, and then slowly study this drop of immeasurable blood, so as to derive and create better creatures!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, he did.

After a while, he copied this drop of immeasurable blood in the outside world, and then his entire body directly entered this drop of immeasurable blood, observing and contemplating this drop of immeasurable blood.

As long as this drop of immeasurable blood is not destroyed, then the copied immeasurable blood will not disappear, which is enough for Ye Tian to continue researching and creating.

Soon after, a high-level immeasurable lifeform succeeded, and it was the most powerful Star Sea Great Ancestor here, and the creatures created by the Star Sea Great Ancestor were directly removed by the Ruins Stone Tower, and could not be studied by other Great Ancestors.

And at this moment, Ye Tian can also create qualified creatures in an instant, but he also wants to create better creatures, so he is not in a hurry to derive and create.

Another period of time passed, and some high-level immeasurable lifeforms were kicked out, while others were successfully derived and created, and after receiving the reward, they directly entered the third layer of the Ruins Stone Tower.

And just as Ye Tian guessed, each high-level immeasurable lifeform received a different reward.

After another period of time, all the high-level immeasurable beings here have left, except for a few new ones.

At this time, Ye Tian finally began to evolve and create!
